title: Anthropic Partner Summit 2026
description: Anthropic hosted its inaugural Partner Summit in Carlsbad for strategic partners, with executive strategy, product deep dives, hands-on collaboration, and a livestream.

title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 keynote and AI conference
description: NVIDIA GTC 2026 ran March 16-19 in San Jose and online, centered on AI infrastructure, AI factories, agentic systems, physical AI, CUDA, and accelerated computing.

title: Mistral AI at NVIDIA GTC 2026
description: Mistral AI joined NVIDIA GTC with open-model, inference, customization, and deployment discussions for builders optimizing language model systems.

title: Google Cloud Next 26
description: Google Cloud Next 26 showcased Google Cloud AI announcements including Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, agentic data cloud updates, and next-generation TPU infrastructure.

title: Code with Claude San Francisco
description: Anthropic opened its Code with Claude developer conference series with hands-on workshops, live demos, and conversations with the teams behind Claude.

title: Code with Claude Extended San Francisco
description: Anthropic added an Extended event for independent developers and early-stage founders with builder stories, deep dives, and laptops-open workshops.

title: Code with Claude London
description: Anthropic brings Code with Claude to London with workshops, live demos, and livestream access for Claude developers.

title: Google I/O 2026 day 1
description: Google I/O 2026 opens online May 19 with Google and developer keynotes, expected to center on Gemini, Android, web, and Google developer platforms.

title: Code with Claude Extended London
description: Anthropic follows Code with Claude London with an Extended builder-focused event for independent developers and founders.

title: Google I/O 2026 day 2
description: Second day of Google I/O 2026 sessions and developer content for Gemini, Android, web, cloud, and AI builders.

title: Mistral AI Now Summit
description: Mistral AI hosts AI Now Summit in Paris with keynotes, workshops, and tracks for leaders and builders moving AI from POC to production.

title: Microsoft Build 2026
description: Microsoft Build 2026 runs June 2-3 in San Francisco and online, with AI, Azure, GitHub, OpenAI, developer tooling, and production app patterns as core themes.

title: Apple WWDC26
description: Apple WWDC26 runs June 8-12 online and free, revealing the latest Apple tools, frameworks, features, and developer sessions across Apple platforms and machine learning technologies.

title: Code with Claude Tokyo
description: Anthropic brings Code with Claude to Tokyo with workshops, live demos, and livestream access for Claude developers.

title: Code with Claude Extended Tokyo
description: Anthropic follows Code with Claude Tokyo with an Extended builder-focused event for independent developers and founders.

title: OpenAI DevDay 2026
description: OpenAI DevDay 2026 is OpenAI’s biggest event of the year, scheduled for September 29 in San Francisco.

title: AWS re:Invent 2026 opens
description: AWS re:Invent 2026 runs November 30-December 4 in Las Vegas, AWS’s flagship cloud event for builders, cloud pioneers, and generative AI teams.
